headline: Claude Cowork has a $0 competitor
image_keyword: zero cost competitor open source enterprise

headline: Open source AI collaboration, on your infrastructure
body: Openwork launched from YC P26 as an open source alternative to Claude's enterprise collaboration tool. You deploy it on your own infrastructure. Every conversation, every decision, every artifact stays inside your network.
image_keyword: open source enterprise deployment server rack

headline: 73% of enterprises fear their data trains competitor models
body: 73% of enterprises using closed AI collaboration tools report anxiety about proprietary data training competitor models. Openwork eliminates that risk entirely because there is no third-party model training on your data.

headline: 40-60% faster project timelines with AI collaboration
body: Internal AI collaboration cuts project timelines by 40-60% at early adopter companies. The shift from messaging about work to doing work alongside AI is the biggest productivity jump since git.

headline: 2 hours to deploy. 28 days to procure SaaS.
body: Deployment takes under 2 hours on existing infrastructure. Compare that to the average 28-day enterprise SaaS procurement cycle. Your team could be collaborating with AI before IT finishes the vendor assessment.
image_keyword: fast deployment vs slow procurement comparison

headline: Your data is free training for their models
body: The real cost of closed AI tools is not the subscription fee. It is the strategic data you are feeding into someone else's training pipeline, forever, for free.

headline: Check out Openwork if you run engineering teams. Link in comments.
image_keyword: CTA check out open source tool
